name: Koshar Style Dill Pickles Wvhv17a
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice cucumbers into spears.
2. Minimize garlic and chop celery.
3. Cut green peppers into strips.
4. Chop 2 heads of dill to taste (I use 1-2).
5. Combine salt, water, and vinegar in a large pot. Bring to a boil and add the chopped dill for 5 minutes.
6. Pack cucumber spears into pint jars, leaving some headspace.
7. Add minced garlic, celery, pepper strips, and chopped dill to each jar.
8. Pour hot brine over cucumbers, ensuring they are completely submerged.
9. Seal jars tightly.
10. Allow the pickles to cool at room temperature for 4-6 weeks before consumption.
Ready in 4-6 weeks.
